Quest._description:
You don't know anything yet...
 > Talk to the bartender < 
[ZQSD] to move, [E] to interact and [UP/DOWN] to zoom
BARTENDER : " You've drunk too much yeasterday, the Shierif is waiting for you. And no alcoohol for you, weak ass ! " > Next <

You've drunk too much last night (you forgot everything) and you must see the Shierif now...
 > Ask the Shierif what happened <

SHIERIF : "Your finaly awake you shity rioter ! Holly cow you trouble-shooter go pay your f'king duty examinating this alien thing over that path !! ... F'king rioter... An alien aaand a riot the same night... G-gun... GUUUUUUNS I'M MANLY ! " > Next <

You must pay your duty to the solo-riot party you did yeasterday : community service... Aliens had come to this planet last night (a lot of things happened there) and the Shierif is very angry at them... Why ? (you'll know soon) 
 > examine the mystery alien thing <

There's no one here; keep following the path. 
 > Explore the path <

CLOTHILDE : "PspspspssssSSS your the alien from yeasterday pspss !! I recognize you ! [lore note : only children can see aliens at night] Pspsssps ... Well I put the arm you stold from that guy at the tavern here in the jar, near the bloody block... It keeps the arm's soul safe. " 
 > Take the jar of formalin <
> Return the jar to Justin at the tavern <

JUSTIN : " Owww thank yyyouuuu ! Well I just remember an operating table inside a flying alien machine, and after that, nothing... Oh ! Yes I remember another thing now ! The Shierif was there too ! But the alien... impossible to remember... " > End discussion <
> Ask the shierif about the UFO <
SHIERIF : "What a gun ! Holly cow I just can't remember this alien scumbag's face, I realy f'cking can't it's impossible ! Gun ! It could be anyone here ! Yeahaw... GUN ! " > Next <
You must exit this freak planet before the Shierif remember the so wanted Alien is you > Return to the UFO <
> Turn on the UFO <
> Wait <
The UFO bugged... So nobody except the formol-bender Clothilde seems to remember that the so-wanted alien is you... > Ask for help to Clothilde <
CLOTHILDE : "MimimimiMIMIMIMIMImimimimimiiiiIIIIIII !!..." > Next <
CLOTHILDE : "miminooou... Hailee, my cat !! The Shierif has kidnapped her !! He said if I don't tell him where you are hidding, he'll keep her ! And he does... (crying)" > Next <
CLOTHILDE : "Poopy cop ! Gzzzz mmmmreloazdsfqgd ! I'll get my revenge mwahahahahahaaaaaa... Would you please assist me ?" > Yes / Absolutely <
CLOTHILDE : "GrrREAT ! Let's go ! now ! now now now !" > Next <
SHIERIF : "Not so far you alien rot !" > Next <
SHIERIF : "GUNN I've just seen you trying to start this shitty alien flying thing, give me my shlong back son of a..." > Next <
CLOTHILDE : "SHUT UP YOU DEAD MAN ! By the strength of formaldehydeeeeeeeee " > Start fight <
> Defeat the shierif <
The shierif is dead ! Now, follow Clothilde to the UFO > Head UFO <
CLOTHILDE : "BY THE STRENGTH OF FORMOL !!!" > Next <
CLOTHILDE : "MimimiMIMIMImimimimi MIMIMI mouahahahahaaaaa !!"
